This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Client Hints headers should be updated on redirects (drop)
  assert_equals: sec-ch-device-memory expected (undefined) undefined but got (string) "8"
[FAIL] Client Hints headers should be updated on redirects (add)
  assert_not_equals: sec-ch-device-memory got disallowed value undefined
Harness: the test ran to completion.
